cards.name: Head of Personnel
cards.desc: Never far far from their closest pal, Ian, they defend the ability to give out AA to anyone who passes.
cards.effect: Once per turn, you may target one Unit you control. Shuffle that Unit into your deck and pick a card of a different Faction to put in your hand

cards.name: Botanist
cards.desc: The main ingredient provider for the chef, skilled botanist can produce plants that can fill a crewmember up and kill them just as quickly.
cards.effect: Once during your turn if this card is in Defense Position, restore 100 Lifepoints.

cards.name: Mime
cards.effect: When this card is summoned, you may negate a Unit's effect during your opponent's next turn.

cards.name: Clown
cards.effect: When targeted by an enemy attack or effect, flip a coin. If heads, negate that attack or effect.

cards.name: Janitor
cards.desc: The humble Janitor travels the station in search of any messes that need cleaning.
cards.effect: Once during your turn, flip a coin. If heads, send one Item card to the Morgue.

cards.name: Chef
cards.desc: Wielder of CQC within their kitchen, the Chef protects their kitchen from any invaders trying to disrupt the distribution of food to the crew.
cards.effect: While this Unit is the only Unit you control, this card gains 400 ATK.

cards.name: Bartender
cards.desc: The station's OTHER source of emotional reassurance, the Bartender serves alcohol to anyone who wants it while shooting any disruptive patrons with their shotgun.
cards.effect: Once during your turn, you may either restore 100 Lifepoints to yourself OR deal 100 Lifepoints to your opponent.

cards.name: Chaplain
cards.desc: The spirtual leader of the station, the Chaplain offers unique services due to their connection with religious higher-ups.
cards.effect: Once per turn, you may target one Unit you control. It cannot be destroyed by battle this turn.

cards.name: Librarian
cards.desc: Usually found within their library writing and printing books, the Librarian is able to loan out books full of knowledge. Don't forget to return them!
cards.effect: Once during your turn, look at the top 2 cards of your deck and palce them back in any order.

cards.name: Pete
cards.desc: The chef's tempermental companion, this goat is not afraid to butt heads with you and take a bite out of your local Diona.
cards.effect: If you control a Chef Unit, this card gains 300 DEF.
